title: New T-Shirts (Now in 100% Organic Cotton) and New Mugs in Our Shop!
summary: Adorn your body and coffee in PDR goodness! We’ve just added 8 new T-shirts and 13 new mugs to our online shop.
full_text: As always, all profits from the shop go straight back into The Public Domain Review — helping us commission new essays, unearth more images, and keep the project freely available to everyone.
